items.title: AMD claims it had no knowledge of fake Ryzen 5 7430U CPUs in Chuwi laptops — Chinese vendor announces recall of products and refunds, PCB manufacturer could be culprit
items.description: AMD has responded to the Chuwi scandal involving mislabeled Ryzen 5 7430U-equipped laptops. The CPU maker claims it had no knowledge of the issue, and warns that it does not condone mislabelling CPUs in any way.

Subscribe to our newsletter AMD has responded to the recent Chuwi scandal, where certain laptop models featuring outdated Ryzen 5 5500U processors were falsely labeled as newer 7430U variants. According to HKEPC, AMD has made an official statement claiming the company had no knowledge of the matter and stated it does not condone any sort of product mislabelling from any manufacturer whatsoever.Go deeper with TH Premium: CPU (Image credit: Tom's Hardware)CPU scaling with DLSSRyzen to the top: How AMD innovated in the gaming CPU marketHow ARM is working its way into PCsAMD CES 2026 gaming trends press Q&A roundtable transcriptThe CPU maker further warned that it has the right to pursue legal action against entities that mislabel its CPU products. AMD has not officially announced it is going after Chuwi yet, but it likely will if the situation gets out of hand."Recently, we have come to the attention of CHUWI, which has misrepresented AMD Ryzen 5 5500U products as Ryzen 5 7430U. AMD has never authorized, confirmed, or acquiesced to this behavior in any way, nor has it participated in the labeling or promotional decisions of related products, and is completely unaware of this matter."Article continues below You may like CPU fraud scandal erupts as another Chinese laptop busted with a fake chip Popular budget-friendly Chinese brand exposed for shocking CPU scam in its laptops "Like new" Ryzen 9 9900X3D Amazon order turns into a shocking CPU bait-and-switch scandal AMD has clear and strict regulations governing the naming, use, and labeling of product models. Any unauthorized use of model names or mislabeling will seriously disrupt the normal market order and may mislead consumers.AMD has always placed great importance on the accuracy and transparency of product information, and is committed to maintaining a fair and orderly market environment and protecting the legitimate rights and interests of users. Our company has taken this matter very seriously and reserves the right to pursue legal action against the relevant parties."--AMDTo recap, two Chuwi laptop models have been caught featuring fake labeling for each model's respective CPU inside — CoreBook X and CoreBook Plus. Both models were allegedly marketed as having AMD's Ryzen 5 7430U mobile CPU, but teardowns revealed that the OPN code for both models' CPUs contradicted their exterior labeling. Instead, these CPUs had older Ryzen 5 5500U processors under the hood.Stay On the Cutting Edge: Get the Tom's Hardware NewsletterGet Tom's Hardware's best news and in-depth reviews, straight to your inbox.Contact me with news and offers from other Future brandsReceive email from us on behalf of our trusted partners or sponsorsHelping matters further is that both CPUs share very similar CPU specifications, making it difficult for novice users to discover which CPU is really inside. The Ryzen 5 7430U and 5500U feature six cores and 12 threads, a 15W TDP, and very similar clock speeds. Where they differ the most is in the architecture and L3 cache capacity; the 7430U comes with Zen 3 cores and 16MB of L3 cache, and the 5500U comes with Zen 2 cores and 8MB of L3 cache.Chuwi attempted to downplay the issue by suggesting there was a mix-up in product batches, but Chuwi was caught changing the processor label at the firmware level, which is something that does not happen by accident. Furthermore, Chuwi allegedly demanded that Notebookcheck remove information about the scandal from its website.Chuwi has since announced a recall on all of its products with mislabeled CPUs, and is offering a full refund for owners of the affected products. These items are the CoreBook X, CoreBook Plus, and Ubox mini PC.The plot thickensDespite all of the evidence piling against Chuwi, another manufacturer has potentially succumbed to the same problem. ComputerBase discovered a forum thread where two owners of a Nikear A15 Pro laptop claim they have a mislabeled 7430U chip inside their laptops. Computerbase noted that the affected Nikear laptop and Chuwi CoreBook X laptop take advantage of the same PCB inside.If this is all true, the problem might actually lie with the PCB manufacturer rather than the laptop makers themselves. The only problem with this information is it was taken from a forum post and has not been confirmed by a reputable outlet or manufacturer. As a result, take this information with a grain of salt. items.author: Aaron Klotz
items.titleZh: AMD声称不知悉驰为笔记本搭载假冒Ryzen 5 7430U处理器——中国厂商宣布召回产品并退款，PCB制造商或成罪魁祸首
items.descriptionZh:
近期，AMD就中国笔记本电脑制造商Chuwi（驰为）爆出的处理器标识造假事件正式作出回应。该事件涉及Chuwi旗下两款笔记本型号——CoreBook X和CoreBook Plus，其宣传搭载了AMD较新的Ryzen 5 7430U移动处理器，但实际拆机后发现内部安装的却是更早一代的Ryzen 5 5500U处理器。

AMD通过HKEPC发布官方声明，明确表示公司对此事毫不知情，且从未以任何形式授权、确认或默许此类行为，也未参与相关产品的标识或宣传决策。AMD强调，其对产品型号的命名、使用和标识有着清晰严格的规定，任何未经授权的型号使用或错误标识都会严重扰乱正常的市场秩序，并可能误导消费者。公司高度重视产品信息的准确性和透明度，致力于维护公平有序的市场环境并保护用户的合法权益。AMD保留对相关责任方采取法律行动的权利。

**核心技术差异与造假手段**

尽管Ryzen 5 7430U与Ryzen 5 5500U在核心参数上表面相似（均为6核12线程、15W TDP，时钟频率接近），但其核心架构和关键性能指标存在本质区别：
-   **Ryzen 5 7430U**：采用**Zen 3架构**，拥有**16MB三级缓存**。
-   **Ryzen 5 5500U**：采用**Zen 2架构**，三级缓存仅为**8MB**。

Zen 3架构相比Zen 2在每时钟周期指令数（IPC）性能上有显著提升，更大的三级缓存也对游戏和应用响应速度有积极影响。因此，7430U的实际性能优于5500U。

此次造假并非简单的包装错误。调查发现，Chuwi在**固件（BIOS/UEFI）层面修改了处理器的识别信息**，使得系统软件（如Windows设备管理器）也错误地将其识别为7430U。这种有意的软件层篡改行为，排除了“批次混淆”的可能性，坐实了蓄意虚假宣传。

**事件发展与行业影响**

事件曝光后，Chuwi最初试图轻描淡写，甚至被曝要求科技媒体Notebookcheck撤下相关报道。在舆论压力下，Chuwi最终宣布对涉及错误标识CPU的产品（包括CoreBook X、CoreBook Plus以及Ubox迷你PC）进行召回，并为受影响用户提供全额退款。

此事件的影响可能不仅限于Chuwi一家。有迹象表明，另一个品牌Nikear的A15 Pro笔记本电脑也可能存在类似的7430U标识造假问题。据Computerbase观察，涉事的Nikear笔记本与Chuwi CoreBook X内部使用了**相同的主板（PCB）**。这引发了新的猜测：问题根源可能在于**上游的主板制造商**，而非单纯的笔记本品牌方行为。不过，关于Nikear的指控目前仅来源于论坛帖子，尚未得到权威媒体或厂商的证实，仍需谨慎看待。

**总结**

本次“CPU标识门”事件揭露了部分低成本笔记本市场中存在的欺诈风险。AMD的强硬表态旨在维护其品牌声誉和市场秩序。对于消费者而言，此事提醒在购买硬件产品时，不能仅依赖系统软件识别，对于参数异常接近但型号不同的产品需保持警惕，必要时可借助第三方硬件检测工具（如CPU-Z）核查处理器原始标识码（OPN）。这一事件也可能促使AMD和整个行业加强对供应链合作伙伴的监管与审查力度。

items.title: DLSS 5: Has Nvidia’s AI graphics technology gone too far?
items.description:
Nvidia has revealed a new “3D guided neural rendering model” called DLSS 5 that can change a game’s lighting and materials in real-time, and… many gamers aren’t happy. From DLSS 5 memes to complaints about how it’s “yassified” Resident Evil Requiem characters in demos, the first impression has not been a good one, no matter how much Nvidia insists that this pursuit of photorealism is still honoring the original artists’ intent.

items.titleZh: DLSS 5：英伟达的AI图形技术会否过了头？
items.descriptionZh:
英伟达近日公开了名为DLSS 5的新型“3D引导神经渲染模型”，该技术能够实时修改游戏中的光照与材质效果，却在玩家社区引发了广泛争议。尽管英伟达强调其追求“照片级真实感”的初衷仍是尊重原作品艺术意图，但演示中《生化危机：安魂曲》角色形象被过度美化（玩家戏称为“网红滤镜化”），导致首批反响消极，相关梗图与批评在社交平台持续发酵。

从技术原理看，DLSS 5突破了传统超分技术的范畴，通过深度学习模型对游戏场景进行三维结构解析，动态重构光照反射、表面质感乃至阴影细节。其核心创新在于引入实时神经渲染管线，将传统预烘焙的光照数据与AI生成的物理拟真效果融合，实现逐帧画面风格的适应性调整。

尽管英伟达未公布具体性能参数，但技术演示显示该模型可在维持帧率稳定的前提下，将低精度渲染素材转化为高保真图像。相较于前代DLSS技术聚焦抗锯齿与分辨率提升，DLSS 5的突破在于对画面艺术风格的动态干预能力——这也正是争议焦点所在。

这项技术的影响已超越硬件性能层面，触及游戏艺术创作自主权的核心议题。支持者认为它可突破原有硬件限制，为经典游戏注入新生；反对者则质疑AI对美术风格的二次加工可能扭曲作品原貌。目前该技术潜在应用场景包括：老旧游戏画面现代化改造、开放世界游戏环境动态拟真增强，以及VR场景的实时物理渲染优化。

行业观察指出，DLSS 5标志着实时图形技术正从“视觉保真度”向“风格可塑性”演进，其发展路径将深刻影响未来游戏开发范式与玩家体验边界。英伟达后续需在技术可控性与艺术尊重之间寻求平衡点，而开发者工具链的开放程度将成为决定该技术走向的关键因素。

Subscribe to our newsletter SK Group chairman Chey Tae-won told reporters at Nvidia's GTC conference in San Jose on Monday that the global memory chip shortage is likely to persist for another four to five years, with industry-wide wafer supply lagging demand by more than 20%, Bloomberg reported. Chey, whose conglomerate controls SK Hynix, said leading memory makers are expanding capacity but are unlikely to fully meet demand until around 2030 because securing additional wafers takes at least four to five years, according to The Korea Times.Go deeper with TH Premium: Memory (Image credit: SK Hynix)AI data centers are swallowing the world's memory and storage supplyThe future of DRAM: From DDR5 to future ICsHigh-bandwidth memory roadmapHere's why HBM is coming for your PC's RAMChey warned that excessive focus on high-bandwidth memory could lead to shortages in conventional DRAM, potentially affecting smartphones and PCs. SK Hynix, Samsung, and Micron have shifted production in recent years toward HBM for AI accelerators, and the resulting shortfall in conventional DRAM output has driven steep price increases across consumer electronics.SK Hynix holds roughly 57% of the global HBM market and 32% of overall DRAM, and the company is currently building a $13 billion HBM packaging and testing facility at its Cheongju complex in South Korea, with construction scheduled to begin next month and completion targeted for the end of 2027.Article continues below You may like Here's why HBM is coming for your PC's RAM Samsung, SK Hynix, Micron team up to block memory hoarding Data centers will consume 70 percent of memory chips made in 2026 Samsung, meanwhile, is expanding DRAM capacity at its Pyeongtaek campus, with its P5 facility expected online by 2028. Micron is also planning a $9.6 billion HBM facility in Hiroshima, but initial output is not expected until 2028 either. Nearly all new capex is going toward HBM lines, where margins are highest.Chey said SK Hynix is preparing measures to help stabilize DRAM prices, and that CEO Kwak Noh-jung is expected to announce a plan soon. He didn’t elaborate on what those measures would involve, though.Gartner on February 26 projected global PC shipments will fall 10.4% and smartphone shipments 8.4% in 2026 compared to 2025 levels, driven by what the firm estimates will be a 130% surge in combined DRAM and SSD prices by the end of the year.This, Gartner says, will lead to price increases of 17% among PCs year-over-year, leading to PC lifetimes extending by 15% for business users and 20% for consumers by the end of 2026, with the entry-level market facing the worst of it.Stay On the Cutting Edge: Get the Tom's Hardware NewsletterGet Tom's Hardware's best news and in-depth reviews, straight to your inbox.Contact me with news and offers from other Future brandsReceive email from us on behalf of our trusted partners or sponsors Follow Tom's Hardware on Google News, or add us as a preferred source, to get our latest news, analysis, & reviews in your feeds.
items.author: Luke James
items.titleZh: SK集团董事长称存储芯片短缺将持续至2030年——晶圆供应比需求低20%
items.descriptionZh:
在全球人工智能浪潮的推动下，内存芯片产业正经历深刻的结构性变革。在近期于圣何塞举行的英伟达GTC大会上，韩国SK集团会长、同时也是全球重要内存制造商SK海力士的掌控者崔泰源向媒体发出警告，指出全球内存芯片短缺的局面预计将持续四到五年。其核心原因在于，全行业的晶圆供应能力落后于需求超过20%。尽管主要制造商正在扩产，但由于建设新的晶圆产能周期长达四至五年，供需平衡预计要到2030年左右才能实现。

此次短缺并非简单的总量不足，而是由剧烈的需求结构变化所驱动。人工智能数据中心的爆发式增长，正以前所未有的速度吞噬着高端内存的产能。近年来，SK海力士、三星和美光三大巨头已将生产重点显著转向用于AI加速器的**高带宽内存**。HBM通过将多个DRAM芯片与GPU/加速器芯片进行3D堆叠和硅通孔互联，实现了远超传统内存的极致带宽，是训练和运行大语言模型的关键硬件。然而，这种战略性转向导致用于智能手机和个人电脑的**传统DRAM**产量相对不足，进而引发了消费电子领域内存价格的飙升。

崔泰源特别警示，对HBM的过度聚焦可能导致传统DRAM的短缺。目前，SK海力士在全球HBM市场占据约57%的份额，在整体DRAM市场占有32%。为巩固领先地位，该公司正在韩国清州投资130亿美元建设先进的HBM封装和测试设施，预计2027年底完工。竞争对手也在积极布局：三星正在平泽园区扩张DRAM产能，其P5工厂预计2028年上线；美光则计划在广岛投资96亿美元建设HBM产线，同样瞄准2028年投产。几乎所有的行业新增资本支出都流向了利润率最高的HBM产线。

这种产能分配不均的后果正在向下游传导。根据Gartner于2月26日发布的预测，由于DRAM和固态硬盘价格在2024年底前预计将合计飙升130%，2026年的全球PC出货量将比2025年下降10.4%，智能手机出货量将下降8.4%。该机构进一步指出，这将导致PC价格同比上涨17%，进而迫使企业和消费者延长设备换机周期，分别达到15%和20%，其中入门级市场受到的影响将最为严重。

面对可能的市场波动，崔泰源表示SK海力士正在准备措施以帮助稳定DRAM价格，相关计划预计将由CEO郭鲁正不久后公布，但具体细节尚未披露。这一系列动态清晰地表明，AI计算需求的崛起正在重塑全球内存产业的格局与优先级，其在赋能尖端科技的同时，也正对广泛的消费电子市场产生显著的价格与供应冲击。

items.title: Bitcoin is so resilient it could survive as much as 90% of the world's undersea cables failing simultaneously — study reveals Bitcoin could still be very vulnerable to targeted attacks, however
items.description: Cambridge scientists have completed the first longitudinal study of Bitcoin’s resilience to network infrastructure disruption, with a particular eye on submarine data cables.
items.content: Copy link Facebook X Whatsapp Reddit Pinterest Flipboard Email Share this article 0 Join the conversation Follow us Add us as a preferred source on Google Newsletter Tom's Hardware Get the Tom's Hardware Newsletter Get Tom's Hardware's best news and in-depth reviews, straight to your inbox. Subscribe to our newsletter Cambridge scientists have completed the first longitudinal study of Bitcoin’s resilience to network infrastructure disruption, with a particular eye on submarine data cable incidents (PDF paper). The conclusion is that “Bitcoin is highly resilient to random cable failures,” with the scientists saying that between 72% and 92% of the world's submarine cables would need to be severed simultaneously to result in significant mode disconnection. Nevertheless, the research team observed that Bitcoin could be very vulnerable to targeted attacks. (Image credit: Cambridge Centre for Alternative Finance)The study took data from 11 years of P2P network traffic and measured the impacts of 68 verified cable fault events (though Bitcoin has been a thing since 2009). As hinted at in the intro, there is a stark contrast between the impacts of ‘random’ cable failure events and what could happen if someone were intent on disrupting this iconic cryptocurrency.Central to the resiliency report is the application of a Buldyrev‑style cascade model to the data. This helps assess real-world systems full of interdependencies: things like computer networks, power grids, and transportation systems.Article continues below You may like Fear that quantum computing is on the cusp of cracking cryptocurrency's encryption lead to downgrades Undersea cable cutting shenanigans lead Finland to create a dedicated maritime surveillance center World’s oldest Bitcoin Mining Pool celebrates 15th anniversary, has mined 1,311,339 bitcoins worth $115 billion Using this math, the Cambridge scientists reckon Bitcoin’s failure threshold for random failures is between 72% and 92%. It is also observed that the adoption of the Tor protocol has proven to be a barrier to disruption. “Bitcoin’s shift to Tor represents a self-organized response to regulatory pressure that simultaneously enhances infrastructure resilience, where censorship resistance and physical robustness are complementary rather than competing properties,” say the Cambridge scientists in their conclusion.As for targeted attacks on the network, that’s a different story. Bitcoin is “far more vulnerable to targeted attacks,” note the researchers. A malicious actor targeting just five of the largest routing domains (Hetzner, OVH, Comcast, Amazon, and Google Cloud) would cripple the Bitcoin network.Image 1 of 2(Image credit: Cambridge Centre for Alternative Finance)(Image credit: Cambridge Centre for Alternative Finance)Overall, the study conclusions are quite positive for cryptocurrency fans. However, the resiliency of the networks that crypto needs to be maintained is under more pressure than ever before, with cables in the Baltic, waters around the Middle East, and the Taiwan Strait all attracting unwelcome disruptions in recent months. items.titleZh: 研究显示：全球九成海底电缆同时失灵仍无碍比特币运转，但针对性攻击或成致命软肋
items.descriptionZh:
剑桥大学科学家首次完成了关于比特币网络面对基础设施中断（尤其是海底数据电缆事故）韧性的纵向研究。研究报告指出，“比特币对随机电缆故障具有高度韧性”，需要同时切断全球72%至92%的海底电缆才会导致网络出现显著的分割与断开。然而，研究团队也观察到，比特币在面对针对性攻击时可能非常脆弱。

这项研究分析了比特币长达11年的点对点网络流量数据，并评估了68起已确认的电缆故障事件的影响。研究表明，随机故障事件的影响与有意图的针对性破坏之间存在鲜明对比。

该韧性报告的核心是**将Buldyrev式级联模型应用于比特币网络数据**。这种模型常用于评估计算机网络、电网和交通系统等充满相互依赖性的现实世界系统。通过此数学模型，剑桥科学家计算出比特币网络在随机故障场景下的失效阈值介于72%至92%之间。

研究还指出，**Tor协议的采用已被证明是增强抗干扰能力的一个屏障**。科学家们在结论中写道：“比特币向Tor的转变代表了一种应对监管压力的自组织响应，它同时增强了基础设施的韧性。在这种情况下，抗审查性和物理鲁棒性是互补而非竞争的特性。”

然而，针对网络的**针对性攻击则是另一回事**。研究人员强调，比特币“在面对针对性攻击时要脆弱得多”。恶意行为者只需针对五个最大的路由域（Hetzner、OVH、Comcast、Amazon和Google Cloud）发起攻击，就足以使比特币网络瘫痪。

总体而言，该研究的结论对加密货币爱好者而言相当积极，确认了比特币底层网络对大规模随机物理损坏具有非凡的抵抗力。但报告也警示，加密货币赖以生存的网络韧性正面临前所未有的压力。近期在波罗的海、中东周边水域以及台湾海峡，海底电缆均遭到了不受欢迎的干扰或破坏事件，凸显了现实世界的地缘政治风险。

items.title: Intel's new Core Ultra 200HX Plus mobile CPUs include 290HX, 270HX Plus flagships — 8% faster gaming claims fall short of 15% boost promised by desktop Arrow Lake Refresh
items.description: No performance metrics for the 270HX Plus yet.

You are now subscribed Your newsletter sign-up was successful An account already exists for this email address, please log in. Subscribe to our newsletter Following the announcement for Core Ultra 200S Plus, Intel has just launched its Arrow Lake refresh for laptops as well, in the form of Core Ultra 200HX Plus. It includes only two SKUs for now — Core Ultra 290HX Plus and Core Ultra 270HX Plus — but several manufacturers have already announced new laptops with these chips. The silicon itself is an iterative upgrade, so let's go over all the details.Unlike the recently launched Panther Lake, these CPUs are purely aimed at performance, going into laptops with discrete graphics and pushing the envelope for mobile capability. The "Plus" designation now represents enthusiasts in Intel's nomenclature. These chips are based on the same Arrow Lake architecture as the existing Core Ultra 200HX CPUs, just more refined to get the most out of the silicon.First up, we have the Core Ultra 290HX Plus (mobile equivalent to the 290K Plus), which will succeed the Core Ultra 285HX. Intel says the 290HX Plus is around 8% faster than the 285HX across games at 1080p; higher resolutions will show even less of a difference. Compared to the four-year-old i9-12900HX, though, the new chip is 62% more performant on average in games and up to 87% faster in productivity tasks.Article continues below You may like Intel's upcoming Core Ultra 9 mobile CPU outperforms most desktop counterparts in new benchmark Intel announces Arrow Lake Refresh CPUs, claims 15% higher gaming performance and multi-threaded boost Intel doubles down on gaming with Panther Lake, claims 76% faster gaming performance Image 1 of 4(Image credit: Intel)(Image credit: Intel)(Image credit: Intel)(Image credit: Intel)Go deeper with TH Premium: CPU (Image credit: Tom's Hardware)CPU scaling with DLSSRyzen to the top: How AMD innovated in the gaming CPU marketHow ARM is working its way into PCsAMD CES 2026 gaming trends press Q&A roundtable transcriptSpecs-wise, we're looking at a higher-binned version of the 285HX: 24 cores (8 P + 16E) and 24 threads running at a maximum clock speed of 5.5 GHz. The chipmaker claims a 900 MHz increase in die-to-die interconnect frequency, which means the cores should be able to communicate more quickly with the memory controller, reducing latency in demanding scenarios.Intel didn't talk much about the Core Ultra 270HX Plus; we don't know how much better it is than its predecessor, but we can still infer from the specs. It's supposed to replace the Core Ultra 265HX, but slots below the Core Ultra 275HX. It has 20 cores (8P + 12E) and 20 threads, and its P-cores can boost up to 5.3 GHz. That's the same as the 265HX, but the E-core boost is set to 4.7 GHz instead of 4.6 GHz.One special feature both SKUs are getting is the new Binary Optimization Tool, which should boost performance in some games. It uses Intel’s compiler and profiling IP to streamline library and executable performance. Marketing speak aside, it's a software-side refinement that reorders the compiled binary, so the CPU doesn't have to wait, resulting in fewer wasted cycles. It's rearranging the binary (compiled data) so that the CPU's front-end is fed continuously.Image 1 of 1(Image credit: Intel)Laptops featuring these new processors have been announced side-by-side today by various vendors, including Dell Alienware, which we've covered separately. Other notable models include Asus' new TUF lineup, with the TUF Gaming A16 and F16, which feature OLED displays for the first time. Only the F16 is powered by the Core Ultra 290HX, and there are no 270HX configs at the moment.Stay On the Cutting Edge: Get the Tom's Hardware NewsletterGet Tom's Hardware's best news and in-depth reviews, straight to your inbox.Contact me with news and offers from other Future brandsReceive email from us on behalf of our trusted partners or sponsorsSimilarly, Asus' ROG brand has unveiled new Strix G16 and G18 laptops, both equipped with the 290HX Plus; the G18 houses a 240 Hz Mini-LED display. The company also teased the Scar 18 coming soon with RTX 5090 graphics. Moreover, Acer's new Predator Helios Neo series comes equipped with the 290HX Plus on the Neo 16S AI and Neo 16 AI, both featuring an OLED screen and up to an Nvidia RTX 5080 laptop GPU.The full list of laptops from additional OEMs, such as Razer, MSI, Lenovo, HP, and more, is available on Intel's website. Availability for these new devices coincides with the release of the Core Ultra 200HX chips, which starts today. Some models are set to launch later, such as Acer's lineup scheduled for July 2026 in North America. We weren't able to spot any active listings for laptops with these CPUs, however.Image 1 of 1(Image credit: Intel) Follow Tom's Hardware on Google News, or add us as a preferred source, to get our latest news, analysis, & reviews in your feeds.
items.author: Hassam Nasir
items.titleZh: 英特尔全新酷睿Ultra 200HX Plus移动处理器包含290HX与270HX Plus旗舰型号——8%游戏性能提升未达桌面版Arrow Lake Refresh承诺的15%增幅
items.descriptionZh:
继Core Ultra 200S Plus系列发布之后，英特尔近日面向笔记本电脑推出了Arrow Lake Refresh产品线，即Core Ultra 200HX Plus系列处理器。该系列初期仅包含两款型号：Core Ultra 290HX Plus和Core Ultra 270HX Plus，但已有多个制造商宣布将推出搭载这些芯片的新款笔记本电脑。此次发布是一次迭代升级，下面将详细解析其技术细节。

与近期发布的Panther Lake不同，Core Ultra 200HX Plus系列纯粹定位于高性能领域，旨在搭载于配备独立显卡的笔记本电脑中，并进一步突破移动平台的性能极限。在英特尔的新命名体系中，“Plus”后缀代表其为面向发烧友的产品。这些芯片基于与现有Core Ultra 200HX CPU相同的Arrow Lake架构，但经过了进一步优化，以充分挖掘硅片的潜力。

首先，Core Ultra 290HX Plus（可视为移动版的290K Plus）将接替Core Ultra 285HX。英特尔宣称，在1080p分辨率游戏场景下，290HX Plus的性能比285HX高出约8%；在更高分辨率下，差异会更小。然而，与四年前的i9-12900HX相比，新芯片在游戏中的平均性能提升了62%，在生产力和创作任务中性能提升最高可达87%。

从规格上看，290HX Plus是285HX的高品质筛选版本：拥有24个核心（8个性能核P-core + 16个能效核E-core）和24线程，最高睿频可达5.5 GHz。英特尔声称其芯片到芯片（die-to-die）互连频率提升了900 MHz，这意味着核心与内存控制器之间的通信速度更快，从而在高负载场景下降低延迟。

英特尔对Core Ultra 270HX Plus的介绍较少，其相较于前代产品的提升幅度尚不明确，但我们仍可从规格中推断。它旨在取代Core Ultra 265HX，但定位低于Core Ultra 275HX。它拥有20个核心（8P + 12E）和20线程，其P核最高可睿频至5.3 GHz，与265HX相同，但E核睿频从4.6 GHz提升至了4.7 GHz。

这两款SKU都具备一项新特性：全新的二进制优化工具（Binary Optimization Tool），据称可以提升部分游戏的性能。该工具利用英特尔的编译器和性能分析知识产权（IP），来优化库文件和可执行文件的性能。简而言之，这是一种软件层面的优化技术，它通过重新排列编译后的二进制代码顺序，使得CPU前端能够持续获取指令，减少等待时间，从而降低无效的周期消耗。

多家厂商已同步宣布了搭载这些新处理器的笔记本电脑。例如，戴尔外星人（Alienware）发布了相关新品（我们已有单独报道）。其他值得注意的机型还包括华硕（Asus）新的TUF系列，包括首次配备OLED显示屏的TUF Gaming A16和F16。其中只有F16搭载了Core Ultra 290HX，目前尚未有搭载270HX的配置。

同样，华硕旗下的ROG品牌也推出了新的Strix G16和G18笔记本电脑，两者均配备290HX Plus芯片；其中G18配备了一块240 Hz刷新率的Mini-LED显示屏。华硕还预告了即将推出的搭载RTX 5090显卡的Scar 18。此外，宏碁（Acer）新的Predator Helios Neo系列，包括Neo 16S AI和Neo 16 AI，也配备了290HX Plus处理器，并搭载OLED屏幕，最高可配英伟达RTX 5080笔记本电脑GPU。

包括雷蛇（Razer）、微星（MSI）、联想（Lenovo）、惠普（HP）等在内的其他原始设备制造商（OEM）的完整笔记本列表，可在英特尔官网上查看。这些新设备的上市时间与Core Ultra 200HX芯片的发布同步，即从今日开始。部分型号将稍晚推出，例如宏碁的部分产品线计划于2026年7月在北美上市。不过，目前尚未看到搭载这些CPU的笔记本电脑有实际在售列表。

Subscribe to our newsletter At a press event attended by Tom's Hardware at GTC 2026, Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang confirmed the company has received export licenses for multiple Chinese customers, has purchase orders in hand, and has restarted H200 manufacturing, marking the first time its China supply chain has been back in motion since export restrictions froze shipments over a year ago.Huang described the situation as “new news,” stating that Nvidia “[has] received purchase orders from many customers [in China], and we're in the process of restarting our manufacturing… our supply chain is getting fired up.”The H200 is Nvidia's Hopper-generation accelerator featuring 141GB of HBM3e memory. It sits below the current Blackwell architecture but remains roughly six times more powerful than the H20, the downgraded chip Nvidia originally designed to stay within earlier export limits. The H200 is what Chinese hyperscalers have been waiting patiently for.Article continues below You may like Nvidia says H200 demand in China is 'very high' as export licenses near completion Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang says China hasn't approved H200 imports yet Nvidia prepares shipment of 82,000 AI GPUs to China as chip war lines blur President Trump announced in December 2025 that Nvidia would be permitted to ship H200 chips to approved Chinese customers, with 25% of sales revenue going to the U.S. government as part of the deal.Go deeper with TH Premium: AI and data centers (Image credit: Microsoft)Photonics and high-speed data movement is the next big AI bottleneckThe data center cooling state of playMassive AI data center buildouts are squeezing energy suppliesUltra Ethernet: The data center interconnection of tomorrowThe Commerce Department's Bureau of Industry and Security formally published the licensing framework in January 2026, and Nvidia confirmed in late February that it had secured a license to ship a small number of H200 units. However, it declined to include any China data-center revenue in its first-quarter sales outlook.Chinese authorities granted ByteDance, Alibaba, and Tencent permission to purchase H200 chips in January, with the three companies collectively approved to buy more than 400,000 units, following earlier reports that Alibaba and ByteDance were ready to order over 200,000 chips each.Nvidia had largely wound down Hopper-class production to focus on Blackwell, but in light of Chinese demand and the green light from Washington, the company said it hoped to reopen H200 orders in 2026.Stay On the Cutting Edge: Get the Tom's Hardware NewsletterGet Tom's Hardware's best news and in-depth reviews, straight to your inbox.Contact me with news and offers from other Future brandsReceive email from us on behalf of our trusted partners or sponsorsHuang at the Q&A also said that President Trump’s position is that the U.S. should lead in access to Nvidia's best technology while still competing for global markets. "He would like us to compete worldwide and not concede those markets unnecessarily," he said.The H200 approval covers only a 50% volume cap relative to domestic U.S. sales, and a third-party laboratory must verify each shipment before re-export to China. items.titleZh: 黄仁勋称：英伟达获中国客户H200订单及美国许可，H200恢复生产
items.descriptionZh:
在英伟达GTC 2026大会的一场新闻发布会上，首席执行官黄仁勋向Tom's Hardware证实，公司已获得向多个中国客户的出口许可证，手握采购订单，并已重启H200芯片的生产。这意味着自一年前出口限制导致对华供应冻结以来，英伟达的中国供应链首次恢复运转。

黄仁勋将此称为"新消息"，并表示："我们已收到许多中国客户的采购订单，我们正在重启制造流程……我们的供应链正在重新启动。"

**技术背景与芯片定位**
H200是英伟达基于Hopper架构的加速器，配备141GB的HBM3e高带宽内存。尽管其架构落后于当前最新的Blackwell，但性能相比此前为符合早期出口限制而设计的"降级版"H20芯片仍高出约六倍。H200正是中国超大规模云计算服务商长期等待的产品。

**政策许可与交易细节**
2025年12月，时任美国总统特朗普宣布，允许英伟达向经批准的中国客户发货H200芯片，但交易附带条件：其销售收入的25%需上缴美国财政部。2026年1月，美国商务部工业与安全局正式发布了许可框架。英伟达在2月底确认已获得少量H200的出口许可证，但在其第一季度销售展望中未计入任何中国数据中心收入。

**中国市场需求与订单**
中国监管机构已于2026年1月批准字节跳动、阿里巴巴和腾讯购买H200芯片。据此前报道，仅阿里和字节就各自准备订购超过20万颗芯片，这三家公司总计获准购买量超过40万颗。黄仁勋表示，中国对H200的需求"非常高涨"。

**生产调整与战略考量**
英伟达此前已基本停止Hopper架构芯片的生产，以集中资源转向Blackwell。然而，鉴于中国的强烈需求及华盛顿的许可，公司表示希望在2026年重新开放H200订单。黄仁勋在问答环节提到，特朗普政府的立场是美国应在获得英伟达最先进技术方面保持领先，同时仍参与全球市场竞争，"他希望我们在全球竞争，而不是不必要地放弃那些市场。"

**出口限制与监管条件**
此次H200的出口批准设有数量上限：对华销售量不得超过其美国国内销量的50%。此外，每批货物在转出口至中国前，必须由第三方实验室进行验证。

**行业影响**
此举标志着在持续的地缘政治和芯片竞争背景下，美国对华AI芯片出口出现了有限的、受严格监管的松动。对于中国头部科技公司而言，获得H200将有助于缓解其在高端AI算力上的缺口，支撑其大规模AI模型训练和数据中心业务。对于英伟达，这意味着在遵守复杂法规的同时，重新进入一个关键市场。然而，附加的营收分成和严格的额度核查机制，也为未来的贸易与技术竞争格局设立了新的先例。

items.title: Jensen Huang says gamers are 'completely wrong' about DLSS 5 — Nvidia CEO responds to DLSS 5 backlash
items.description: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang responded to backlash against DLSS 5, saying artistic control remained with developers and that the AI works with existing geometry.
items.content: Copy link Facebook X Whatsapp Reddit Pinterest Flipboard Email Share this article 88 Join the conversation Follow us Add us as a preferred source on Google Newsletter Tom's Hardware Get the Tom's Hardware Newsletter Get Tom's Hardware's best news and in-depth reviews, straight to your inbox. You are now subscribed Your newsletter sign-up was successful An account already exists for this email address, please log in. Subscribe to our newsletter At a press Q&A with Tom's Hardware at GTC 2026, Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang downplayed criticism of DLSS 5, the company's new use of AI and neural rendering to infer how certain features of games would look if they were more photorealistic.Go deeper with TH Premium: GPUs (Image credit: Noctua)Desktop RoadmapEnterprise RoadmapRubin in-depthThe Stout Owl: The ultimate Noctua G2 PCSince the debut of the feature, some critics have vocally complained on social media that the technology is making games look worse, homogenous, or only show Nvidia's view of the world. Much of the criticism has focused on the updated appearances of Resident Evil Requiem's Grace Ashcroft and Leon Kennedy."Well, first of all, they're completely wrong," Huang said in response to a question from Tom's Hardware editor-in-chief Paul Alcorn about the criticism."The reason for that is because, as I have explained very carefully, DLSS 5 fuses controllability of the of geometry and textures and everything about the game with generative AI," Huang continued. Announcing NVIDIA DLSS 5 | AI-Powered Breakthrough in Visual Fidelity for Games - YouTube Watch On He added that developers can still "fine-tune the generative AI" to make it match their style, adding that DLSS 5 adds generative capability to the existing geometry of the game, but that it "doesn't change the artistic control.""It’s not post-processing, it’s not post-processing at the frame level, it’s generative control at the geometry level," he said.Article continues below You may like Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang says "the future is neural rendering" at CES 2026 We got a first look at Nvidia's DLSS 5 and the future of neural rendering at GTC Nvidia debuts DLSS 5 for hyper-realistic visual fidelity in games Huang also said that developers can try the tool and see how they want to use it, suggesting that it's up to a developer to try to make a "toon shader" or see if the game should be "made of glass." "All of that is in the control — direct control — of the game developer," he said. This is very different than generative AI; it’s content-control generative AI. That’s why we call it neural rendering."We'll see if the vocal gamers who say they dislike what they see change their mind as we see more. DLSS 5 is set to launch in the fall, and there will likely be far more demos of this technology that are more fully baked before then. items.titleZh: 黄仁勋称玩家对DLSS 5"完全搞错了"——英伟达CEO回应DLSS 5争议
items.descriptionZh:
在2026年GTC大会期间，英伟达首席执行官黄仁勋于一场与Tom's Hardware的新闻问答中，回应了针对该公司最新AI图形技术DLSS 5的批评声浪。自该技术亮相以来，部分评论者通过社交媒体抱怨，称该技术导致游戏画面观感下降、风格趋同，或仅体现了英伟达的主观视觉偏好。批评焦点尤其集中在《生化危机：安魂曲》中角色格雷斯·阿什克罗夫特和里昂·肯尼迪更新后的外观表现上。

面对Tom's Hardware主编保罗·阿尔康提出的相关质疑，黄仁勋直接回应：“首先，他们完全错了。”他进一步阐释道，DLSS 5的核心创新在于“将游戏几何、纹理等所有要素的可控性与生成式AI相融合”。他强调，开发者依然可以对生成式AI进行“精细调校”，以契合其艺术风格。DLSS 5是在游戏现有几何结构基础上增加了生成能力，但“并未改变艺术创作的控制权”。

黄仁勋明确区分了DLSS 5与传统技术路径：“这不是后处理，不是在帧级别进行的后处理，而是在几何层级进行的生成式控制。”他解释说，开发者可以自由尝试利用该工具实现各种效果，例如尝试“卡通着色器”或探索“玻璃材质世界”的风格。“所有这些都处于游戏开发者的直接控制之下，”他补充道，“这与普通的生成式AI非常不同；这是一种内容可控的生成式AI。因此我们将其称为‘神经渲染’。”

尽管当前存在争议，但随着今年秋季DLSS 5正式上市前更多成熟技术演示的公布，观察那些持批评意见的玩家是否会改变看法将是一个值得关注的焦点。该技术标志着英伟达在利用AI重构实时图形渲染管线方面迈出了重要一步，旨在为开发者提供一套强大且可控的工具，以突破传统渲染的效率与表现力限制，而非单纯替代艺术家的创作意图。目前，关于其具体的性能提升参数、与传统渲染的对比数据以及在更多游戏引擎中的集成细节，仍有待官方后续披露。

history.title: AMD claims it had no knowledge of fake Ryzen 5 7430U CPUs in Chuwi laptops — Chinese vendor announces recall of products and refunds, PCB manufacturer could be culprit
history.description: AMD has responded to the Chuwi scandal involving mislabeled Ryzen 5 7430U-equipped laptops. The CPU maker claims it had no knowledge of the issue, and warns that it does not condone mislabelling CPUs in any way.

Subscribe to our newsletter AMD has responded to the recent Chuwi scandal, where certain laptop models featuring outdated Ryzen 5 5500U processors were falsely labeled as newer 7430U variants. According to HKEPC, AMD has made an official statement claiming the company had no knowledge of the matter and stated it does not condone any sort of product mislabelling from any manufacturer whatsoever.Go deeper with TH Premium: CPU (Image credit: Tom's Hardware)CPU scaling with DLSSRyzen to the top: How AMD innovated in the gaming CPU marketHow ARM is working its way into PCsAMD CES 2026 gaming trends press Q&A roundtable transcriptThe CPU maker further warned that it has the right to pursue legal action against entities that mislabel its CPU products. AMD has not officially announced it is going after Chuwi yet, but it likely will if the situation gets out of hand."Recently, we have come to the attention of CHUWI, which has misrepresented AMD Ryzen 5 5500U products as Ryzen 5 7430U. AMD has never authorized, confirmed, or acquiesced to this behavior in any way, nor has it participated in the labeling or promotional decisions of related products, and is completely unaware of this matter."Article continues below You may like CPU fraud scandal erupts as another Chinese laptop busted with a fake chip Popular budget-friendly Chinese brand exposed for shocking CPU scam in its laptops "Like new" Ryzen 9 9900X3D Amazon order turns into a shocking CPU bait-and-switch scandal AMD has clear and strict regulations governing the naming, use, and labeling of product models. Any unauthorized use of model names or mislabeling will seriously disrupt the normal market order and may mislead consumers.AMD has always placed great importance on the accuracy and transparency of product information, and is committed to maintaining a fair and orderly market environment and protecting the legitimate rights and interests of users. Our company has taken this matter very seriously and reserves the right to pursue legal action against the relevant parties."--AMDTo recap, two Chuwi laptop models have been caught featuring fake labeling for each model's respective CPU inside — CoreBook X and CoreBook Plus. Both models were allegedly marketed as having AMD's Ryzen 5 7430U mobile CPU, but teardowns revealed that the OPN code for both models' CPUs contradicted their exterior labeling. Instead, these CPUs had older Ryzen 5 5500U processors under the hood.Stay On the Cutting Edge: Get the Tom's Hardware NewsletterGet Tom's Hardware's best news and in-depth reviews, straight to your inbox.Contact me with news and offers from other Future brandsReceive email from us on behalf of our trusted partners or sponsorsHelping matters further is that both CPUs share very similar CPU specifications, making it difficult for novice users to discover which CPU is really inside. The Ryzen 5 7430U and 5500U feature six cores and 12 threads, a 15W TDP, and very similar clock speeds. Where they differ the most is in the architecture and L3 cache capacity; the 7430U comes with Zen 3 cores and 16MB of L3 cache, and the 5500U comes with Zen 2 cores and 8MB of L3 cache.Chuwi attempted to downplay the issue by suggesting there was a mix-up in product batches, but Chuwi was caught changing the processor label at the firmware level, which is something that does not happen by accident. Furthermore, Chuwi allegedly demanded that Notebookcheck remove information about the scandal from its website.Chuwi has since announced a recall on all of its products with mislabeled CPUs, and is offering a full refund for owners of the affected products. These items are the CoreBook X, CoreBook Plus, and Ubox mini PC.The plot thickensDespite all of the evidence piling against Chuwi, another manufacturer has potentially succumbed to the same problem. ComputerBase discovered a forum thread where two owners of a Nikear A15 Pro laptop claim they have a mislabeled 7430U chip inside their laptops. Computerbase noted that the affected Nikear laptop and Chuwi CoreBook X laptop take advantage of the same PCB inside.If this is all true, the problem might actually lie with the PCB manufacturer rather than the laptop makers themselves. The only problem with this information is it was taken from a forum post and has not been confirmed by a reputable outlet or manufacturer. As a result, take this information with a grain of salt. history.author: Aaron Klotz
history.titleZh: AMD声称不知悉驰为笔记本搭载假冒Ryzen 5 7430U处理器——中国厂商宣布召回产品并退款，PCB制造商或成罪魁祸首
history.descriptionZh:
近期，AMD就中国笔记本电脑制造商Chuwi（驰为）爆出的处理器标识造假事件正式作出回应。该事件涉及Chuwi旗下两款笔记本型号——CoreBook X和CoreBook Plus，其宣传搭载了AMD较新的Ryzen 5 7430U移动处理器，但实际拆机后发现内部安装的却是更早一代的Ryzen 5 5500U处理器。

AMD通过HKEPC发布官方声明，明确表示公司对此事毫不知情，且从未以任何形式授权、确认或默许此类行为，也未参与相关产品的标识或宣传决策。AMD强调，其对产品型号的命名、使用和标识有着清晰严格的规定，任何未经授权的型号使用或错误标识都会严重扰乱正常的市场秩序，并可能误导消费者。公司高度重视产品信息的准确性和透明度，致力于维护公平有序的市场环境并保护用户的合法权益。AMD保留对相关责任方采取法律行动的权利。

**核心技术差异与造假手段**

尽管Ryzen 5 7430U与Ryzen 5 5500U在核心参数上表面相似（均为6核12线程、15W TDP，时钟频率接近），但其核心架构和关键性能指标存在本质区别：
-   **Ryzen 5 7430U**：采用**Zen 3架构**，拥有**16MB三级缓存**。
-   **Ryzen 5 5500U**：采用**Zen 2架构**，三级缓存仅为**8MB**。

Zen 3架构相比Zen 2在每时钟周期指令数（IPC）性能上有显著提升，更大的三级缓存也对游戏和应用响应速度有积极影响。因此，7430U的实际性能优于5500U。

此次造假并非简单的包装错误。调查发现，Chuwi在**固件（BIOS/UEFI）层面修改了处理器的识别信息**，使得系统软件（如Windows设备管理器）也错误地将其识别为7430U。这种有意的软件层篡改行为，排除了“批次混淆”的可能性，坐实了蓄意虚假宣传。

**事件发展与行业影响**

事件曝光后，Chuwi最初试图轻描淡写，甚至被曝要求科技媒体Notebookcheck撤下相关报道。在舆论压力下，Chuwi最终宣布对涉及错误标识CPU的产品（包括CoreBook X、CoreBook Plus以及Ubox迷你PC）进行召回，并为受影响用户提供全额退款。

此事件的影响可能不仅限于Chuwi一家。有迹象表明，另一个品牌Nikear的A15 Pro笔记本电脑也可能存在类似的7430U标识造假问题。据Computerbase观察，涉事的Nikear笔记本与Chuwi CoreBook X内部使用了**相同的主板（PCB）**。这引发了新的猜测：问题根源可能在于**上游的主板制造商**，而非单纯的笔记本品牌方行为。不过，关于Nikear的指控目前仅来源于论坛帖子，尚未得到权威媒体或厂商的证实，仍需谨慎看待。

**总结**

本次“CPU标识门”事件揭露了部分低成本笔记本市场中存在的欺诈风险。AMD的强硬表态旨在维护其品牌声誉和市场秩序。对于消费者而言，此事提醒在购买硬件产品时，不能仅依赖系统软件识别，对于参数异常接近但型号不同的产品需保持警惕，必要时可借助第三方硬件检测工具（如CPU-Z）核查处理器原始标识码（OPN）。这一事件也可能促使AMD和整个行业加强对供应链合作伙伴的监管与审查力度。

history.titleZh: DLSS 5：英伟达的AI图形技术会否过了头？
history.descriptionZh:
英伟达近日公开了名为DLSS 5的新型“3D引导神经渲染模型”，该技术能够实时修改游戏中的光照与材质效果，却在玩家社区引发了广泛争议。尽管英伟达强调其追求“照片级真实感”的初衷仍是尊重原作品艺术意图，但演示中《生化危机：安魂曲》角色形象被过度美化（玩家戏称为“网红滤镜化”），导致首批反响消极，相关梗图与批评在社交平台持续发酵。

从技术原理看，DLSS 5突破了传统超分技术的范畴，通过深度学习模型对游戏场景进行三维结构解析，动态重构光照反射、表面质感乃至阴影细节。其核心创新在于引入实时神经渲染管线，将传统预烘焙的光照数据与AI生成的物理拟真效果融合，实现逐帧画面风格的适应性调整。

尽管英伟达未公布具体性能参数，但技术演示显示该模型可在维持帧率稳定的前提下，将低精度渲染素材转化为高保真图像。相较于前代DLSS技术聚焦抗锯齿与分辨率提升，DLSS 5的突破在于对画面艺术风格的动态干预能力——这也正是争议焦点所在。

这项技术的影响已超越硬件性能层面，触及游戏艺术创作自主权的核心议题。支持者认为它可突破原有硬件限制，为经典游戏注入新生；反对者则质疑AI对美术风格的二次加工可能扭曲作品原貌。目前该技术潜在应用场景包括：老旧游戏画面现代化改造、开放世界游戏环境动态拟真增强，以及VR场景的实时物理渲染优化。

行业观察指出，DLSS 5标志着实时图形技术正从“视觉保真度”向“风格可塑性”演进，其发展路径将深刻影响未来游戏开发范式与玩家体验边界。英伟达后续需在技术可控性与艺术尊重之间寻求平衡点，而开发者工具链的开放程度将成为决定该技术走向的关键因素。

Subscribe to our newsletter SK Group chairman Chey Tae-won told reporters at Nvidia's GTC conference in San Jose on Monday that the global memory chip shortage is likely to persist for another four to five years, with industry-wide wafer supply lagging demand by more than 20%, Bloomberg reported. Chey, whose conglomerate controls SK Hynix, said leading memory makers are expanding capacity but are unlikely to fully meet demand until around 2030 because securing additional wafers takes at least four to five years, according to The Korea Times.Go deeper with TH Premium: Memory (Image credit: SK Hynix)AI data centers are swallowing the world's memory and storage supplyThe future of DRAM: From DDR5 to future ICsHigh-bandwidth memory roadmapHere's why HBM is coming for your PC's RAMChey warned that excessive focus on high-bandwidth memory could lead to shortages in conventional DRAM, potentially affecting smartphones and PCs. SK Hynix, Samsung, and Micron have shifted production in recent years toward HBM for AI accelerators, and the resulting shortfall in conventional DRAM output has driven steep price increases across consumer electronics.SK Hynix holds roughly 57% of the global HBM market and 32% of overall DRAM, and the company is currently building a $13 billion HBM packaging and testing facility at its Cheongju complex in South Korea, with construction scheduled to begin next month and completion targeted for the end of 2027.Article continues below You may like Here's why HBM is coming for your PC's RAM Samsung, SK Hynix, Micron team up to block memory hoarding Data centers will consume 70 percent of memory chips made in 2026 Samsung, meanwhile, is expanding DRAM capacity at its Pyeongtaek campus, with its P5 facility expected online by 2028. Micron is also planning a $9.6 billion HBM facility in Hiroshima, but initial output is not expected until 2028 either. Nearly all new capex is going toward HBM lines, where margins are highest.Chey said SK Hynix is preparing measures to help stabilize DRAM prices, and that CEO Kwak Noh-jung is expected to announce a plan soon. He didn’t elaborate on what those measures would involve, though.Gartner on February 26 projected global PC shipments will fall 10.4% and smartphone shipments 8.4% in 2026 compared to 2025 levels, driven by what the firm estimates will be a 130% surge in combined DRAM and SSD prices by the end of the year.This, Gartner says, will lead to price increases of 17% among PCs year-over-year, leading to PC lifetimes extending by 15% for business users and 20% for consumers by the end of 2026, with the entry-level market facing the worst of it.Stay On the Cutting Edge: Get the Tom's Hardware NewsletterGet Tom's Hardware's best news and in-depth reviews, straight to your inbox.Contact me with news and offers from other Future brandsReceive email from us on behalf of our trusted partners or sponsors Follow Tom's Hardware on Google News, or add us as a preferred source, to get our latest news, analysis, & reviews in your feeds.
history.author: Luke James
history.titleZh: SK集团董事长称存储芯片短缺将持续至2030年——晶圆供应比需求低20%
history.descriptionZh:
在全球人工智能浪潮的推动下，内存芯片产业正经历深刻的结构性变革。在近期于圣何塞举行的英伟达GTC大会上，韩国SK集团会长、同时也是全球重要内存制造商SK海力士的掌控者崔泰源向媒体发出警告，指出全球内存芯片短缺的局面预计将持续四到五年。其核心原因在于，全行业的晶圆供应能力落后于需求超过20%。尽管主要制造商正在扩产，但由于建设新的晶圆产能周期长达四至五年，供需平衡预计要到2030年左右才能实现。

此次短缺并非简单的总量不足，而是由剧烈的需求结构变化所驱动。人工智能数据中心的爆发式增长，正以前所未有的速度吞噬着高端内存的产能。近年来，SK海力士、三星和美光三大巨头已将生产重点显著转向用于AI加速器的**高带宽内存**。HBM通过将多个DRAM芯片与GPU/加速器芯片进行3D堆叠和硅通孔互联，实现了远超传统内存的极致带宽，是训练和运行大语言模型的关键硬件。然而，这种战略性转向导致用于智能手机和个人电脑的**传统DRAM**产量相对不足，进而引发了消费电子领域内存价格的飙升。

崔泰源特别警示，对HBM的过度聚焦可能导致传统DRAM的短缺。目前，SK海力士在全球HBM市场占据约57%的份额，在整体DRAM市场占有32%。为巩固领先地位，该公司正在韩国清州投资130亿美元建设先进的HBM封装和测试设施，预计2027年底完工。竞争对手也在积极布局：三星正在平泽园区扩张DRAM产能，其P5工厂预计2028年上线；美光则计划在广岛投资96亿美元建设HBM产线，同样瞄准2028年投产。几乎所有的行业新增资本支出都流向了利润率最高的HBM产线。

这种产能分配不均的后果正在向下游传导。根据Gartner于2月26日发布的预测，由于DRAM和固态硬盘价格在2024年底前预计将合计飙升130%，2026年的全球PC出货量将比2025年下降10.4%，智能手机出货量将下降8.4%。该机构进一步指出，这将导致PC价格同比上涨17%，进而迫使企业和消费者延长设备换机周期，分别达到15%和20%，其中入门级市场受到的影响将最为严重。

面对可能的市场波动，崔泰源表示SK海力士正在准备措施以帮助稳定DRAM价格，相关计划预计将由CEO郭鲁正不久后公布，但具体细节尚未披露。这一系列动态清晰地表明，AI计算需求的崛起正在重塑全球内存产业的格局与优先级，其在赋能尖端科技的同时，也正对广泛的消费电子市场产生显著的价格与供应冲击。

history.title: Bitcoin is so resilient it could survive as much as 90% of the world's undersea cables failing simultaneously — study reveals Bitcoin could still be very vulnerable to targeted attacks, however
history.description: Cambridge scientists have completed the first longitudinal study of Bitcoin’s resilience to network infrastructure disruption, with a particular eye on submarine data cables.

Subscribe to our newsletter Cambridge scientists have completed the first longitudinal study of Bitcoin’s resilience to network infrastructure disruption, with a particular eye on submarine data cable incidents (PDF paper). The conclusion is that “Bitcoin is highly resilient to random cable failures,” with the scientists saying that between 72% and 92% of the world's submarine cables would need to be severed simultaneously to result in significant mode disconnection. Nevertheless, the research team observed that Bitcoin could be very vulnerable to targeted attacks. (Image credit: Cambridge Centre for Alternative Finance)The study took data from 11 years of P2P network traffic and measured the impacts of 68 verified cable fault events (though Bitcoin has been a thing since 2009). As hinted at in the intro, there is a stark contrast between the impacts of ‘random’ cable failure events and what could happen if someone were intent on disrupting this iconic cryptocurrency.Central to the resiliency report is the application of a Buldyrev‑style cascade model to the data. This helps assess real-world systems full of interdependencies: things like computer networks, power grids, and transportation systems.Article continues below You may like Fear that quantum computing is on the cusp of cracking cryptocurrency's encryption lead to downgrades Undersea cable cutting shenanigans lead Finland to create a dedicated maritime surveillance center World’s oldest Bitcoin Mining Pool celebrates 15th anniversary, has mined 1,311,339 bitcoins worth $115 billion Using this math, the Cambridge scientists reckon Bitcoin’s failure threshold for random failures is between 72% and 92%. It is also observed that the adoption of the Tor protocol has proven to be a barrier to disruption. “Bitcoin’s shift to Tor represents a self-organized response to regulatory pressure that simultaneously enhances infrastructure resilience, where censorship resistance and physical robustness are complementary rather than competing properties,” say the Cambridge scientists in their conclusion.As for targeted attacks on the network, that’s a different story. Bitcoin is “far more vulnerable to targeted attacks,” note the researchers. A malicious actor targeting just five of the largest routing domains (Hetzner, OVH, Comcast, Amazon, and Google Cloud) would cripple the Bitcoin network.Image 1 of 2(Image credit: Cambridge Centre for Alternative Finance)(Image credit: Cambridge Centre for Alternative Finance)Overall, the study conclusions are quite positive for cryptocurrency fans. However, the resiliency of the networks that crypto needs to be maintained is under more pressure than ever before, with cables in the Baltic, waters around the Middle East, and the Taiwan Strait all attracting unwelcome disruptions in recent months. history.titleZh: 研究显示：全球九成海底电缆同时失灵仍无碍比特币运转，但针对性攻击或成致命软肋
history.descriptionZh:
剑桥大学科学家首次完成了关于比特币网络面对基础设施中断（尤其是海底数据电缆事故）韧性的纵向研究。研究报告指出，“比特币对随机电缆故障具有高度韧性”，需要同时切断全球72%至92%的海底电缆才会导致网络出现显著的分割与断开。然而，研究团队也观察到，比特币在面对针对性攻击时可能非常脆弱。

这项研究分析了比特币长达11年的点对点网络流量数据，并评估了68起已确认的电缆故障事件的影响。研究表明，随机故障事件的影响与有意图的针对性破坏之间存在鲜明对比。

该韧性报告的核心是**将Buldyrev式级联模型应用于比特币网络数据**。这种模型常用于评估计算机网络、电网和交通系统等充满相互依赖性的现实世界系统。通过此数学模型，剑桥科学家计算出比特币网络在随机故障场景下的失效阈值介于72%至92%之间。

研究还指出，**Tor协议的采用已被证明是增强抗干扰能力的一个屏障**。科学家们在结论中写道：“比特币向Tor的转变代表了一种应对监管压力的自组织响应，它同时增强了基础设施的韧性。在这种情况下，抗审查性和物理鲁棒性是互补而非竞争的特性。”

然而，针对网络的**针对性攻击则是另一回事**。研究人员强调，比特币“在面对针对性攻击时要脆弱得多”。恶意行为者只需针对五个最大的路由域（Hetzner、OVH、Comcast、Amazon和Google Cloud）发起攻击，就足以使比特币网络瘫痪。

总体而言，该研究的结论对加密货币爱好者而言相当积极，确认了比特币底层网络对大规模随机物理损坏具有非凡的抵抗力。但报告也警示，加密货币赖以生存的网络韧性正面临前所未有的压力。近期在波罗的海、中东周边水域以及台湾海峡，海底电缆均遭到了不受欢迎的干扰或破坏事件，凸显了现实世界的地缘政治风险。

history.title: Intel's new Core Ultra 200HX Plus mobile CPUs include 290HX, 270HX Plus flagships — 8% faster gaming claims fall short of 15% boost promised by desktop Arrow Lake Refresh
history.description: No performance metrics for the 270HX Plus yet.
history.content: Copy link Facebook X Whatsapp Reddit Pinterest Flipboard Email Share this article 0 Join the conversation Follow us Add us as a preferred source on Google Newsletter Tom's Hardware Get the Tom's Hardware Newsletter Get Tom's Hardware's best news and in-depth reviews, straight to your inbox. You are now subscribed Your newsletter sign-up was successful An account already exists for this email address, please log in. Subscribe to our newsletter Following the announcement for Core Ultra 200S Plus, Intel has just launched its Arrow Lake refresh for laptops as well, in the form of Core Ultra 200HX Plus. It includes only two SKUs for now — Core Ultra 290HX Plus and Core Ultra 270HX Plus — but several manufacturers have already announced new laptops with these chips. The silicon itself is an iterative upgrade, so let's go over all the details.Unlike the recently launched Panther Lake, these CPUs are purely aimed at performance, going into laptops with discrete graphics and pushing the envelope for mobile capability. The "Plus" designation now represents enthusiasts in Intel's nomenclature. These chips are based on the same Arrow Lake architecture as the existing Core Ultra 200HX CPUs, just more refined to get the most out of the silicon.First up, we have the Core Ultra 290HX Plus (mobile equivalent to the 290K Plus), which will succeed the Core Ultra 285HX. Intel says the 290HX Plus is around 8% faster than the 285HX across games at 1080p; higher resolutions will show even less of a difference. Compared to the four-year-old i9-12900HX, though, the new chip is 62% more performant on average in games and up to 87% faster in productivity tasks.Article continues below You may like Intel's upcoming Core Ultra 9 mobile CPU outperforms most desktop counterparts in new benchmark Intel announces Arrow Lake Refresh CPUs, claims 15% higher gaming performance and multi-threaded boost Intel doubles down on gaming with Panther Lake, claims 76% faster gaming performance Image 1 of 4(Image credit: Intel)(Image credit: Intel)(Image credit: Intel)(Image credit: Intel)Go deeper with TH Premium: CPU (Image credit: Tom's Hardware)CPU scaling with DLSSRyzen to the top: How AMD innovated in the gaming CPU marketHow ARM is working its way into PCsAMD CES 2026 gaming trends press Q&A roundtable transcriptSpecs-wise, we're looking at a higher-binned version of the 285HX: 24 cores (8 P + 16E) and 24 threads running at a maximum clock speed of 5.5 GHz. The chipmaker claims a 900 MHz increase in die-to-die interconnect frequency, which means the cores should be able to communicate more quickly with the memory controller, reducing latency in demanding scenarios.Intel didn't talk much about the Core Ultra 270HX Plus; we don't know how much better it is than its predecessor, but we can still infer from the specs. It's supposed to replace the Core Ultra 265HX, but slots below the Core Ultra 275HX. It has 20 cores (8P + 12E) and 20 threads, and its P-cores can boost up to 5.3 GHz. That's the same as the 265HX, but the E-core boost is set to 4.7 GHz instead of 4.6 GHz.One special feature both SKUs are getting is the new Binary Optimization Tool, which should boost performance in some games. It uses Intel’s compiler and profiling IP to streamline library and executable performance. Marketing speak aside, it's a software-side refinement that reorders the compiled binary, so the CPU doesn't have to wait, resulting in fewer wasted cycles. It's rearranging the binary (compiled data) so that the CPU's front-end is fed continuously.Image 1 of 1(Image credit: Intel)Laptops featuring these new processors have been announced side-by-side today by various vendors, including Dell Alienware, which we've covered separately. Other notable models include Asus' new TUF lineup, with the TUF Gaming A16 and F16, which feature OLED displays for the first time. Only the F16 is powered by the Core Ultra 290HX, and there are no 270HX configs at the moment.Stay On the Cutting Edge: Get the Tom's Hardware NewsletterGet Tom's Hardware's best news and in-depth reviews, straight to your inbox.Contact me with news and offers from other Future brandsReceive email from us on behalf of our trusted partners or sponsorsSimilarly, Asus' ROG brand has unveiled new Strix G16 and G18 laptops, both equipped with the 290HX Plus; the G18 houses a 240 Hz Mini-LED display. The company also teased the Scar 18 coming soon with RTX 5090 graphics. Moreover, Acer's new Predator Helios Neo series comes equipped with the 290HX Plus on the Neo 16S AI and Neo 16 AI, both featuring an OLED screen and up to an Nvidia RTX 5080 laptop GPU.The full list of laptops from additional OEMs, such as Razer, MSI, Lenovo, HP, and more, is available on Intel's website. Availability for these new devices coincides with the release of the Core Ultra 200HX chips, which starts today. Some models are set to launch later, such as Acer's lineup scheduled for July 2026 in North America. We weren't able to spot any active listings for laptops with these CPUs, however.Image 1 of 1(Image credit: Intel) Follow Tom's Hardware on Google News, or add us as a preferred source, to get our latest news, analysis, & reviews in your feeds.
history.author: Hassam Nasir
history.titleZh: 英特尔全新酷睿Ultra 200HX Plus移动处理器包含290HX与270HX Plus旗舰型号——8%游戏性能提升未达桌面版Arrow Lake Refresh承诺的15%增幅
history.descriptionZh:
继Core Ultra 200S Plus系列发布之后，英特尔近日面向笔记本电脑推出了Arrow Lake Refresh产品线，即Core Ultra 200HX Plus系列处理器。该系列初期仅包含两款型号：Core Ultra 290HX Plus和Core Ultra 270HX Plus，但已有多个制造商宣布将推出搭载这些芯片的新款笔记本电脑。此次发布是一次迭代升级，下面将详细解析其技术细节。

与近期发布的Panther Lake不同，Core Ultra 200HX Plus系列纯粹定位于高性能领域，旨在搭载于配备独立显卡的笔记本电脑中，并进一步突破移动平台的性能极限。在英特尔的新命名体系中，“Plus”后缀代表其为面向发烧友的产品。这些芯片基于与现有Core Ultra 200HX CPU相同的Arrow Lake架构，但经过了进一步优化，以充分挖掘硅片的潜力。

首先，Core Ultra 290HX Plus（可视为移动版的290K Plus）将接替Core Ultra 285HX。英特尔宣称，在1080p分辨率游戏场景下，290HX Plus的性能比285HX高出约8%；在更高分辨率下，差异会更小。然而，与四年前的i9-12900HX相比，新芯片在游戏中的平均性能提升了62%，在生产力和创作任务中性能提升最高可达87%。

从规格上看，290HX Plus是285HX的高品质筛选版本：拥有24个核心（8个性能核P-core + 16个能效核E-core）和24线程，最高睿频可达5.5 GHz。英特尔声称其芯片到芯片（die-to-die）互连频率提升了900 MHz，这意味着核心与内存控制器之间的通信速度更快，从而在高负载场景下降低延迟。

英特尔对Core Ultra 270HX Plus的介绍较少，其相较于前代产品的提升幅度尚不明确，但我们仍可从规格中推断。它旨在取代Core Ultra 265HX，但定位低于Core Ultra 275HX。它拥有20个核心（8P + 12E）和20线程，其P核最高可睿频至5.3 GHz，与265HX相同，但E核睿频从4.6 GHz提升至了4.7 GHz。

这两款SKU都具备一项新特性：全新的二进制优化工具（Binary Optimization Tool），据称可以提升部分游戏的性能。该工具利用英特尔的编译器和性能分析知识产权（IP），来优化库文件和可执行文件的性能。简而言之，这是一种软件层面的优化技术，它通过重新排列编译后的二进制代码顺序，使得CPU前端能够持续获取指令，减少等待时间，从而降低无效的周期消耗。

多家厂商已同步宣布了搭载这些新处理器的笔记本电脑。例如，戴尔外星人（Alienware）发布了相关新品（我们已有单独报道）。其他值得注意的机型还包括华硕（Asus）新的TUF系列，包括首次配备OLED显示屏的TUF Gaming A16和F16。其中只有F16搭载了Core Ultra 290HX，目前尚未有搭载270HX的配置。

同样，华硕旗下的ROG品牌也推出了新的Strix G16和G18笔记本电脑，两者均配备290HX Plus芯片；其中G18配备了一块240 Hz刷新率的Mini-LED显示屏。华硕还预告了即将推出的搭载RTX 5090显卡的Scar 18。此外，宏碁（Acer）新的Predator Helios Neo系列，包括Neo 16S AI和Neo 16 AI，也配备了290HX Plus处理器，并搭载OLED屏幕，最高可配英伟达RTX 5080笔记本电脑GPU。

包括雷蛇（Razer）、微星（MSI）、联想（Lenovo）、惠普（HP）等在内的其他原始设备制造商（OEM）的完整笔记本列表，可在英特尔官网上查看。这些新设备的上市时间与Core Ultra 200HX芯片的发布同步，即从今日开始。部分型号将稍晚推出，例如宏碁的部分产品线计划于2026年7月在北美上市。不过，目前尚未看到搭载这些CPU的笔记本电脑有实际在售列表。

Subscribe to our newsletter At a press event attended by Tom's Hardware at GTC 2026, Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang confirmed the company has received export licenses for multiple Chinese customers, has purchase orders in hand, and has restarted H200 manufacturing, marking the first time its China supply chain has been back in motion since export restrictions froze shipments over a year ago.Huang described the situation as “new news,” stating that Nvidia “[has] received purchase orders from many customers [in China], and we're in the process of restarting our manufacturing… our supply chain is getting fired up.”The H200 is Nvidia's Hopper-generation accelerator featuring 141GB of HBM3e memory. It sits below the current Blackwell architecture but remains roughly six times more powerful than the H20, the downgraded chip Nvidia originally designed to stay within earlier export limits. The H200 is what Chinese hyperscalers have been waiting patiently for.Article continues below You may like Nvidia says H200 demand in China is 'very high' as export licenses near completion Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang says China hasn't approved H200 imports yet Nvidia prepares shipment of 82,000 AI GPUs to China as chip war lines blur President Trump announced in December 2025 that Nvidia would be permitted to ship H200 chips to approved Chinese customers, with 25% of sales revenue going to the U.S. government as part of the deal.Go deeper with TH Premium: AI and data centers (Image credit: Microsoft)Photonics and high-speed data movement is the next big AI bottleneckThe data center cooling state of playMassive AI data center buildouts are squeezing energy suppliesUltra Ethernet: The data center interconnection of tomorrowThe Commerce Department's Bureau of Industry and Security formally published the licensing framework in January 2026, and Nvidia confirmed in late February that it had secured a license to ship a small number of H200 units. However, it declined to include any China data-center revenue in its first-quarter sales outlook.Chinese authorities granted ByteDance, Alibaba, and Tencent permission to purchase H200 chips in January, with the three companies collectively approved to buy more than 400,000 units, following earlier reports that Alibaba and ByteDance were ready to order over 200,000 chips each.Nvidia had largely wound down Hopper-class production to focus on Blackwell, but in light of Chinese demand and the green light from Washington, the company said it hoped to reopen H200 orders in 2026.Stay On the Cutting Edge: Get the Tom's Hardware NewsletterGet Tom's Hardware's best news and in-depth reviews, straight to your inbox.Contact me with news and offers from other Future brandsReceive email from us on behalf of our trusted partners or sponsorsHuang at the Q&A also said that President Trump’s position is that the U.S. should lead in access to Nvidia's best technology while still competing for global markets. "He would like us to compete worldwide and not concede those markets unnecessarily," he said.The H200 approval covers only a 50% volume cap relative to domestic U.S. sales, and a third-party laboratory must verify each shipment before re-export to China. history.author: Luke James
history.titleZh: 黄仁勋称：英伟达获中国客户H200订单及美国许可，H200恢复生产
history.descriptionZh:
在英伟达GTC 2026大会的一场新闻发布会上，首席执行官黄仁勋向Tom's Hardware证实，公司已获得向多个中国客户的出口许可证，手握采购订单，并已重启H200芯片的生产。这意味着自一年前出口限制导致对华供应冻结以来，英伟达的中国供应链首次恢复运转。

黄仁勋将此称为"新消息"，并表示："我们已收到许多中国客户的采购订单，我们正在重启制造流程……我们的供应链正在重新启动。"

**技术背景与芯片定位**
H200是英伟达基于Hopper架构的加速器，配备141GB的HBM3e高带宽内存。尽管其架构落后于当前最新的Blackwell，但性能相比此前为符合早期出口限制而设计的"降级版"H20芯片仍高出约六倍。H200正是中国超大规模云计算服务商长期等待的产品。

**政策许可与交易细节**
2025年12月，时任美国总统特朗普宣布，允许英伟达向经批准的中国客户发货H200芯片，但交易附带条件：其销售收入的25%需上缴美国财政部。2026年1月，美国商务部工业与安全局正式发布了许可框架。英伟达在2月底确认已获得少量H200的出口许可证，但在其第一季度销售展望中未计入任何中国数据中心收入。

**中国市场需求与订单**
中国监管机构已于2026年1月批准字节跳动、阿里巴巴和腾讯购买H200芯片。据此前报道，仅阿里和字节就各自准备订购超过20万颗芯片，这三家公司总计获准购买量超过40万颗。黄仁勋表示，中国对H200的需求"非常高涨"。

**生产调整与战略考量**
英伟达此前已基本停止Hopper架构芯片的生产，以集中资源转向Blackwell。然而，鉴于中国的强烈需求及华盛顿的许可，公司表示希望在2026年重新开放H200订单。黄仁勋在问答环节提到，特朗普政府的立场是美国应在获得英伟达最先进技术方面保持领先，同时仍参与全球市场竞争，"他希望我们在全球竞争，而不是不必要地放弃那些市场。"

**出口限制与监管条件**
此次H200的出口批准设有数量上限：对华销售量不得超过其美国国内销量的50%。此外，每批货物在转出口至中国前，必须由第三方实验室进行验证。

**行业影响**
此举标志着在持续的地缘政治和芯片竞争背景下，美国对华AI芯片出口出现了有限的、受严格监管的松动。对于中国头部科技公司而言，获得H200将有助于缓解其在高端AI算力上的缺口，支撑其大规模AI模型训练和数据中心业务。对于英伟达，这意味着在遵守复杂法规的同时，重新进入一个关键市场。然而，附加的营收分成和严格的额度核查机制，也为未来的贸易与技术竞争格局设立了新的先例。

history.title: Jensen Huang says gamers are 'completely wrong' about DLSS 5 — Nvidia CEO responds to DLSS 5 backlash
history.description: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang responded to backlash against DLSS 5, saying artistic control remained with developers and that the AI works with existing geometry.
history.content: Copy link Facebook X Whatsapp Reddit Pinterest Flipboard Email Share this article 88 Join the conversation Follow us Add us as a preferred source on Google Newsletter Tom's Hardware Get the Tom's Hardware Newsletter Get Tom's Hardware's best news and in-depth reviews, straight to your inbox. You are now subscribed Your newsletter sign-up was successful An account already exists for this email address, please log in. Subscribe to our newsletter At a press Q&A with Tom's Hardware at GTC 2026, Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang downplayed criticism of DLSS 5, the company's new use of AI and neural rendering to infer how certain features of games would look if they were more photorealistic.Go deeper with TH Premium: GPUs (Image credit: Noctua)Desktop RoadmapEnterprise RoadmapRubin in-depthThe Stout Owl: The ultimate Noctua G2 PCSince the debut of the feature, some critics have vocally complained on social media that the technology is making games look worse, homogenous, or only show Nvidia's view of the world. Much of the criticism has focused on the updated appearances of Resident Evil Requiem's Grace Ashcroft and Leon Kennedy."Well, first of all, they're completely wrong," Huang said in response to a question from Tom's Hardware editor-in-chief Paul Alcorn about the criticism."The reason for that is because, as I have explained very carefully, DLSS 5 fuses controllability of the of geometry and textures and everything about the game with generative AI," Huang continued. Announcing NVIDIA DLSS 5 | AI-Powered Breakthrough in Visual Fidelity for Games - YouTube Watch On He added that developers can still "fine-tune the generative AI" to make it match their style, adding that DLSS 5 adds generative capability to the existing geometry of the game, but that it "doesn't change the artistic control.""It’s not post-processing, it’s not post-processing at the frame level, it’s generative control at the geometry level," he said.Article continues below You may like Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang says "the future is neural rendering" at CES 2026 We got a first look at Nvidia's DLSS 5 and the future of neural rendering at GTC Nvidia debuts DLSS 5 for hyper-realistic visual fidelity in games Huang also said that developers can try the tool and see how they want to use it, suggesting that it's up to a developer to try to make a "toon shader" or see if the game should be "made of glass." "All of that is in the control — direct control — of the game developer," he said. This is very different than generative AI; it’s content-control generative AI. That’s why we call it neural rendering."We'll see if the vocal gamers who say they dislike what they see change their mind as we see more. DLSS 5 is set to launch in the fall, and there will likely be far more demos of this technology that are more fully baked before then. history.author: Andrew E. Freedman
history.titleZh: 黄仁勋称玩家对DLSS 5"完全搞错了"——英伟达CEO回应DLSS 5争议
history.descriptionZh:
在2026年GTC大会期间，英伟达首席执行官黄仁勋于一场与Tom's Hardware的新闻问答中，回应了针对该公司最新AI图形技术DLSS 5的批评声浪。自该技术亮相以来，部分评论者通过社交媒体抱怨，称该技术导致游戏画面观感下降、风格趋同，或仅体现了英伟达的主观视觉偏好。批评焦点尤其集中在《生化危机：安魂曲》中角色格雷斯·阿什克罗夫特和里昂·肯尼迪更新后的外观表现上。

面对Tom's Hardware主编保罗·阿尔康提出的相关质疑，黄仁勋直接回应：“首先，他们完全错了。”他进一步阐释道，DLSS 5的核心创新在于“将游戏几何、纹理等所有要素的可控性与生成式AI相融合”。他强调，开发者依然可以对生成式AI进行“精细调校”，以契合其艺术风格。DLSS 5是在游戏现有几何结构基础上增加了生成能力，但“并未改变艺术创作的控制权”。

黄仁勋明确区分了DLSS 5与传统技术路径：“这不是后处理，不是在帧级别进行的后处理，而是在几何层级进行的生成式控制。”他解释说，开发者可以自由尝试利用该工具实现各种效果，例如尝试“卡通着色器”或探索“玻璃材质世界”的风格。“所有这些都处于游戏开发者的直接控制之下，”他补充道，“这与普通的生成式AI非常不同；这是一种内容可控的生成式AI。因此我们将其称为‘神经渲染’。”

尽管当前存在争议，但随着今年秋季DLSS 5正式上市前更多成熟技术演示的公布，观察那些持批评意见的玩家是否会改变看法将是一个值得关注的焦点。该技术标志着英伟达在利用AI重构实时图形渲染管线方面迈出了重要一步，旨在为开发者提供一套强大且可控的工具，以突破传统渲染的效率与表现力限制，而非单纯替代艺术家的创作意图。目前，关于其具体的性能提升参数、与传统渲染的对比数据以及在更多游戏引擎中的集成细节，仍有待官方后续披露。
